## Safety

- Does this touch child data, safety policy, learning-answer behavior, model routing, prompts, memory, or parent reporting?
- Confirm no real secrets, child-identifying data, unnecessary raw audio/photos, or long raw chat transcripts were added.
- Confirm the change does not make the AI ask children to keep secrets, hide things from trusted adults, or depend on the AI as a unique friend.

## Checklist

- [ ] I read `AGENTS.md` and the relevant v0.1 docs.
- [ ] I kept business logic out of API routes where applicable.
- [ ] I used Mock providers by default and did not require real external model calls in tests.
- [ ] I added or updated tests for changed behavior, or explained why tests are not applicable.
- [ ] I updated docs or progress tracking when needed.
